title: Write refusal/guardrail + compliance doc (cancer guardrails, exclude-list)
context: M0 foundation. Codifies the cancer-data guardrails and exclude-list that bound all downstream curation. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author the refusal/guardrail and compliance document covering the open-access-only rule, the exclude-list, the 'not medical advice' stance, the provenance mandate, and the escalation path.
acceptanceCriteria: Documents the open-access-only rule and the exclude-list (controlled-access / identifiable / non-commercial sources).
States 'not medical advice', the provenance mandate, and the 'when in doubt, stop and surface' escalation path.
Referenced from README/CONTRIBUTING as the binding compliance policy.
